reasoning: North Macedonia is a stable European nation and NATO member with no recorded armed 'Battles' in the ACLED dataset over the 360-day period preceding August 2025. Achieving the threshold of >10 battles would require an unprecedented onset of full-scale armed conflict (at least 11 major violent interactions between organized armed groups within a single 30-day window). For the nearest resolution date (Sept 7), the 30-day window heavily overlaps with August 2025, a month in which we already know no such outbreak occurred. For distant dates, while political tensions sometimes surface in the broader region, the likelihood of escalation into sustained organized warfare remains vanishingly small, resulting in estimates at the near-minimum possible.
